channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Man Injured in Russia Requests Government Help to Return Home
item.description: Denis Mokaya Mongare, a Kenyan man currently receiving treatment in a Russian hospital, has issued a heartfelt plea for help after finding himself trapped in the Ukraine conflict. Mongare explains tha...

item.title: Apple Launches $599 MacBook Neo for Students and Budget Buyers
item.description: Apple don launch their newest laptop wey dem call MacBook Neo, and e be di cheapest MacBook wey dem don release till now, costing only $599. This laptop dey mainly for students, casual users, and anyb...

item.title: How Female Friendships Boost Women’s Health, Resilience and Success
item.description: Research shows that female friendships play a huge role in shaping women's mental, emotional and even physical wellbeing across their lives. From childhood to menopause, strong bonds between women hel...

item.title: US-Israel war with Iran enters ninth day amid escalating strikes, retaliatory attacks on Gulf states and Israel, and diplomatic tensions between Trump and Starmer
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran has entered its ninth day, marked by intense military exchanges. US and Israeli airstrikes have targeted Iranian oil depots and infrast...

item.title: ICC Prosecutors Seek Clarification on Duterte Lawyers’ Involvement
item.description: Prosecutors at the International Criminal Court (ICC) have requested that former President Rodrigo Duterte’s legal team clarify the role of six Filipino lawyers who attended his confirmation of charge...

item.title: China’s iron ore stockpiles surge, raising concerns over Australian export revenues
item.description: China's stockpiles of iron ore have soared to an unprecedented 163.3 million tonnes, marking a 25 per cent increase since August. This rise is largely attributed to waning demand from the cooling prop...

item.title: China urges respect for Iran's sovereignty amid Middle East conflict
item.description: China has strongly advised against attempts to change the government in Iran, warning that any such moves would not have support from the people. Speaking at a major annual event in Beijing, Chinese F...

item.title: Matt Stevens Transforms Popular Movies into Vintage Book Covers
item.description: Artist and designer Matt Stevens combines his love for cinema with his graphic design skills in a creative project that reimagines well-known movies as vintage-style book covers. The series, called 'G...

item.title: Republican Jewish Coalition Backs Gallrein, Criticizes Massie's Stance on Iran Conflict
item.description: The Republican Jewish Coalition Victory Fund launched a 30-second ad on Thursday supporting Ed Gallrein, President Donald Trump's endorsed candidate in Kentucky's GOP primary against Rep. Thomas Massi...

item.title: Josh Morrissey sets franchise record with overtime goal in Jets victory
item.description: Josh Morrissey returned to the Winnipeg Jets lineup on March 8, 2026, after a 23-day absence due to an upper-body injury sustained at the Milan Cortina Olympics. His return was historic, as he scored ...

item.title: First Lady Oluremi Tinubu Highlights Importance of Women’s Empowerment for Nigeria’s Growth
item.description: For International Women’s Day 2026, First Lady Oluremi Tinubu remind Nigerians say empowering women no be small charity, na proper investment wey fit help Nigeria grow. She talk say the theme for this...

item.title: This International Women’s Day, let us work for real progress, not just performances
item.description: Article this International Women’s Day, let us dance for progress rather than performance inNation Africa inaleta kusema kwamba International Women’s Day si tu display ya color, speeches na events tu,...

item.title: Bonny Federal Polytechnic Names Key Administrative Officers for Faculties and Departments
item.description: The Federal Polytechnic of Oil and Gas, Bonny, Rivers State, don appoint new Deans, Heads of Departments (HODs) and Directors for various faculties and departments. According to the school management,...

item.title: Expert Analysis: Iran's Missile Stockpiles Remain Largely Intact in Underground Mountain Bases Despite US-Israeli Claims
item.description: The article counters claims by US and Israeli officials that Iran's missile arsenal is significantly depleted and that the number of launchers is low. According to Yury Lyamin, a researcher from Mosco...

item.title: Understanding the Invisible Labour and Structural Challenges Women Face
item.description: On International Women’s Day, celebrations often highlight progress and resilience, but they rarely acknowledge the unequal burdens women continue to bear. Women frequently carry emotional, domestic, ...

item.title: The Future of Work in an AI-Driven Economy: Skilled Trades May Remain Essential
item.description: Joel Kotkin argues that while artificial intelligence promises significant advances in medicine and manufacturing, it also poses a profound threat to the workforce and societal structure. AI is expect...

item.title: India post 255-5 against New Zealand in T20 World Cup final at Ahmedabad
item.description: In the T20 World Cup final held in Ahmedabad on Sunday, India managed to put up a huge total of 255-5 against New Zealand, thanks largely to Sanju Samson's brilliant 89 runs off just 46 balls. Samson,...

item.title: Lagos Police Commissioner Jimoh Scheduled For AIG Promotion; Tijani Fatai Considered For His Role
item.description: Olohundare Moshood Jimoh, wey be the current Lagos State Commissioner of Police, dey set to get promotion to the rank of Assistant Inspector General (AIG) come Tuesday. E sources don talk sey the prom...

item.title: Rastriya Swatantra Party secures majority in Nepal parliamentary elections; Balendra Shah to be PM
item.description: In Nepal's recent general elections, the Rastriya Swatantra Party achieved a remarkable victory, securing 119 direct seats and leading in six more, according to the Election Commission of Nepal. This ...

item.title: Tanzanian Startup Flowteller Expands Mobile Money Services Beyond Cash
item.description: Dar es Salaam-based digital startup Flowteller has impressed at the 11th Harambe Evening startup pitch in Masaki, taking home 1.8 million shillings after being named top venture. The startup enables m...
